description_long: This is a large, L-shaped wooden desk with a light oak finish, featuring a spacious main work surface and a secondary return for additional workspace. The desk includes three pull-out drawers on the left side, each with a metallic handle, and an open shelving unit on the right for storage or display. The front panel is solid, providing privacy and structural support, while the right side has a white accent panel. The top surface is smooth and expansive, suitable for computers, paperwork, or other office equipment. The overall design is modern and functional, with clean lines and practical storage solutions. The construction appears sturdy, making it suitable for professional or home office environments.
description: A large, L-shaped light oak desk with three drawers, open shelving, and a white accent panel, designed for ample workspace and storage.
description_view_0: Front view showing the solid wood panel and white accent panel on the right side.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the depth of the desk and the thickness of the wood panels.
description_view_2: Top-down view revealing the L-shape, three drawers on the left, and open shelving on the right.
description_view_3: Back view displaying the open shelving unit and the rear panel structure.
attribute_orientation: The user-facing side is the long edge with the drawers and open leg space, while the solid panel and white accent panel form the front and right sides.
